message:
feat: Implement real kqueue/epoll selectors, SSL hostname matching, and module path finding

selectors.zig - Real I/O multiplexing implementations:
- KqueueSelector: Full kqueue() implementation for macOS/BSD
  - kevent() for register/unregister/select operations
  - Proper filter handling (EVFILT_READ/WRITE)
  - Timeout support with timespec conversion
- EpollSelector: Full epoll() implementation for Linux
  - epoll_create1/epoll_ctl/epoll_wait operations
  - EPOLLIN/EPOLLOUT event mapping

ssl.zig - Certificate and SSL improvements:
- loadDefaultCerts(): Search common system CA locations
  - Debian, RHEL, OpenSUSE, Fedora, macOS, FreeBSD paths
- matchHostname(): Real hostname verification
  - Subject Alternative Name (SAN) checking
  - Common Name (CN) fallback
  - Wildcard certificate support (*.example.com)
- unwrap(): Proper SSL shutdown with state cleanup

importlib.zig - Module path searching:
- PathFinder.find_spec(): Search paths for modules
  - Package detection (__init__.py)
  - Module files (.py, .pyc, .so, .zig)
  - Default search paths
- invalidate_caches(): Module cache clearing
